entry.title: When Light Leaves the Lab: A Breakthrough for Depression Treatment

link.title: When Light Leaves the Lab: A Breakthrough for Depression Treatment

entry.content: Redirecting to the original article on Inspire the Mind.
entry.summary: Article on a light-based breakthrough for depression treatment and the path from lab discovery to real-world care.

entry.title: The light that instructs the brain to support in healing
